settings.text: Ready to start? Let's talk about your space.

settings.title: Office & Yard Hours
settings.text:
Monday — Friday: 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM
Saturday: 8:00 AM – 1:00 PM
Site visits by appointment

settings.question: What should I prepare for a consultation?
settings.answer: Have a rough idea of what you'd like to change and your budget range. Photos of your space and any inspiration images are helpful. We'll handle the rest — measuring, soil assessment, and design ideas are all part of our free consultation.

settings.question: How much does a typical project cost?
settings.answer: Small planting projects start around $2,000. A typical residential design + installation runs $8,000–$25,000 depending on scope. Hardscape-heavy projects can run higher. We always provide a detailed quote before starting.

settings.question: Do you work through winter?
settings.answer: Yes. Hardscaping, drainage work, and tree care happen year-round. Planting is best in spring and fall, but we plan winter projects so everything is ready to install when the season turns.

settings.question: What's included in a maintenance plan?
settings.answer: Plans are customized, but typically include mowing, edging, pruning, weeding, fertilization, seasonal cleanup, and irrigation adjustments. We check in monthly and adjust the plan as your landscape matures.
